user.title: XMEye / Sofia Device
user.description: Connect to an XMEye/Sofia DVR, NVR or IP camera. To auto-discover devices on your network, use the scan option.

discovery.title: LAN Discovery
discovery.description: Found {found} XMEye/Sofia device(s) on your network. Select one to configure.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — check host and port
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check username and password
error.discovery_no_devices: No devices found on the network. Enter connection details manually.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs
